prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该科类最低录取位次分别为5439→4756→3594→2612→2965，整体呈显著上升趋势（位次数字减小），近4年累计前移约2474名；2024年因广西首年新高考（物理类）位次大幅跃升至2612，2025年小幅回调至2965，基准位次约2965名；该校在广西理科/物理类招生计划逐年缩减：2021年105人、2022年104人、2023年89人、2024年77人、2025年66人；2026年计划仅30人，较2025年大幅缩招约54.5%，缩招幅度显著，但2026年招生专业全部为创新班/拔尖班（人工智能未来卓越班、电子信息类创新班等），专业层次大幅提升，对高分考生吸引力增强。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第28名，近年稳定在28–32名区间，属国内顶尖工科强校；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及历史投档异常信号（2023年电信学部在部分省份位次断档），但该事件距今较远且非广西本地；抖音热度排名第55位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上，反映一定报考关注度；未见广西本地投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估A-及以上10个：化学工程与技术A+、机械工程A、土木工程A、工商管理A、力学A、软件工程A、管理科学与工程A、生物医学工程A、控制科学与工程A-、环境科学与工程A-；2026年招生专业均对应优势学科（计算机科学与技术A、机械工程A等），学科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，人工智能方向关注度上升；土木建筑类明显劝退，但该校2026年广西招生已不涉及土木类专业；广西物理类考生数持续增长（2024年250877→2025年260429→2026年估算约268912），考生规模扩大加剧竞争；大连理工大学位于辽宁，在广西属跨省招生；2025年该校在广西招生13人（占全国总招生约2.17%），占比不高，地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026年大幅缩招但专业全面升级为创新班/拔尖班、广西物理类考生持续增长、计算机/电子信息类专业高热等关键因素，在2025年基准2965名基础上，预计2026年最低录取位次将进一步前移。预测最低位次约1915名，区间1685–2145名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 智能制造工程（创新班）
- 电子信息类（创新班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 人工智能（未来卓越班）
- 人工智能（新工科大师班）
- 计算机科学与技术（国家基础学科拔尖计划班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 应用物理学（王大珩物理国家基础科学拔尖计划班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年大连理工大学在广西仅招收6个顶尖专业（全部为创新班/拔尖班），位次预测区间1685–2145名。建议位次在1700名以内的考生可重点冲刺一档专业（智能制造工程创新班、电子信息类创新班）；位次在1900名左右的考生以二档专业为主（人工智能类、计算机科学与技术拔尖班）；位次在2100名左右的考生可将三档专业（应用物理学拔尖班）作为保底选择。所有专业均享有优质培养资源，建议结合个人兴趣与学科评估等级综合决策。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for this subject category were 5439 → 4756 → 3594 → 2612 → 2965, showing a significant upward trend (decreasing rank numbers), with a cumulative advance of about 2474 positions over the past 4 years; in 2024, due to Guangxi's first year of the new college entrance examination (Physics Category), the ranking jumped sharply to 2612, then slightly adjusted back to 2965 in 2025, with a baseline ranking of about 2965; the university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Guangxi has been decreasing year by year: 105 in 2021, 104 in 2022, 89 in 2023, 77 in 2024, 66 in 2025; the 2026 plan is only 30, a significant reduction of about 54.5% compared to 2025, but all majors in the 2026 enrollment are innovation/top-tier classes (e.g., Artificial Intelligence Future Excellence Class, Electronic Information Innovation Class), greatly enhancing the program level and attracting high-scoring candidates.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 28th in the 2026 main list of the Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities, stable in the 28–32 range in recent years, a top domestic engineering powerhouse; the reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly involving historical abnormal admission signals (e.g., the 2023 ranking gap for the School of Electronic Information and Electrical Engineering in some provinces), but this event is relatively distant and not local to Guangxi; Douyin popularity ranking 55th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure, reflecting some application attention; no record of admission ranking gaps in Guangxi; fifth round of discipline evaluation with 10 disciplines rated A- or above: Chemical Engineering and Technology A+, Mechanical Engineering A, Civil Engineering A, Business Administration A, Mechanics A, Software Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Biomedical Engineering A, Control Science and Engineering A-, Environmental Science and Engineering A-; all 2026 enrollment majors correspond to advantageous disciplines (e.g., Computer Science and Technology A, Mechanical Engineering A), with outstanding disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering, and other majors continue to be highly recommended, with increasing attention on artificial intelligence; civil engineering and architecture are clearly discouraged, but the university's 2026 enrollment in Guangxi no longer involves civil engineering majors; the number of physics category candidates in Guangxi continues to grow (2024: 250877 → 2025: 260429 → 2026 estimate: about 268912), intensifying competition due to the expanding candidate pool; Dalian University of Technology is located in Liaoning, representing cross-provincial enrollment in Guangxi; in 2025, the university enrolled 13 students in Guangxi (about 2.17% of total national enrollment), a low proportion, with limited regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous upward trend in historical rankings, the significant enrollment reduction in 2026 but comprehensive upgrade to innovation/top-tier classes, the sustained growth of physics category candidates in Guangxi, and the high popularity of computer/electronic information majors, based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 2965, the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to advance further. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1915, with a range of 1685–2145.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering (Innovation Class)
- Electronic Information (Innovation Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Artificial Intelligence (Future Excellence Class)
- Artificial Intelligence (New Engineering Master Class)
- Computer Science and Technology (National Basic Discipline Top Talent Program Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier)
- Applied Physics (Wang Daheng Physics National Basic Science Top Talent Program Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Dalian University of Technology will only enroll 6 top-tier majors in Guangxi (all innovation/top-tier classes), with a predicted ranking range of 1685–2145. Candidates with rankings within 1700 are advised to focus on Tier 1 majors (Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering Innovation Class, Electronic Information Innovation Class); those with rankings around 1900 should primarily target Tier 2 majors (Artificial Intelligence classes, Computer Science and Technology Top Talent Program); candidates with rankings around 2100 can consider Tier 3 majors (Applied Physics Top Talent Program) as a safety choice. All majors enjoy high-quality training resources, and it is recommended to make decisions based on personal interests and discipline evaluation levels.
